settings.label: NEXT-GEN NASAL TECH
settings.body: HiStrips uses multi-layer tension-release technology to gently lift and open your nasal passages, giving you up to 40% more oxygen with every breath.

settings.title: Clinically Designed. Backed by Experts in Sleep & Respiratory Health.
Performance-focused
settings.body: Strong hold, immediate airflow expansion, no fiddling, no reapplying.

settings.title: Engineered for Motion
settings.body: Built for performance — the grip doesn't budge, even during sweat-heavy workouts or deep sleep.

settings.title: Stable, Yet Flexible
settings.body: No collapsing. No warping. The reinforced band ensures consistent lift with a soft-touch feel.

settings.title: Medical Grade
settings.body: Hypoallergenic, FDA-registered materials. Strong enough for performance, gentle enough for nightly wear.

settings.question: Will they stay on during intense workouts?
settings.answer: Yes! HiStrips uses a strong yet gentle adhesive that keeps them in place, even during intense workouts or active movement.

settings.question: What makes HiStrips different from other nasal strips?
settings.answer: 1. Premium adhesive that stays on even during sweat and sleep (72h). 2. Bold design — finally something that looks good. 3. Sleek resealable pouch with 30 strips per pack. 4. Trusted by 150,000+ athletes worldwide. 5. Developed for performance, recovery, and aesthetics.

settings.question: How many strips are in a pack?
settings.answer: Each pack contains 30 strips, giving you a full month of nightly or daily use.

settings.question: Is it safe for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes — HiStrips are made with hypoallergenic, FDA-registered materials gentle enough for daily wear.

settings.question: Do they help with snoring?
settings.answer: Many users report a significant reduction in snoring due to improved nasal airflow keeping the nose clear throughout the night.
